headline: Philip Morris: IQOS And ZYN Offset Combustibles Volume Decline
summary: Philip Morris Q1 2026: EPS $1.96, +9% revenue led by IQOS/ZYN, but combustibles fall and valuation looks rich. Click here to read more about the PM stock.
